title: Transfers & multi-currency — compare total cost
intro: For non-euro or cross-border sends, compare amount received and FX on each provider’s calculator — not headline fee alone.

items.reason: International transfers — run the same corridor through Wise and your bank to compare all-in cost.
Also used for FX-heavy sends — read plan limits and fee windows on Revolut’s official pricing page.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
